## Sharing Observations

OmegaClaw is experimental and actively under development. We're not running a support line, but we do read everything filed here, and your observations directly shape what gets worked on.

If the agent does something unexpected or surprising, open an observation. You don't need to diagnose the cause or write a bug report. "It did X and I expected Y" is enough.

**What to expect after filing:**

- We are unlikely to respond individually — especially at volume.
- We will monitor, tag, and track patterns and respond where appropriate.
